name: Homemade Strawberry Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the sugar, cornstarch (or 2 tablespoons flour), and salt.
2. Gradually mix in the whole milk and evaporated milk until well combined.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until hot but not bubbling.
4. Whisk together the egg yolks and 1 cup of the hot mixture.
5. Slowly pour this back into the saucepan with the remaining liquid, whisking continuously.
6. Cook over low heat for about 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until slightly thickened.
7. Stir in the heavy whipping cream and vanilla extract until well mixed.
8. Allow the mixture to cool to lukewarm temperature.
9. Gently fold in the strawberries and peach slices.
10. Pour the mixture into an ice cream maker and churn according to the manufacturer's instructions.
11. Transfer to a container, freeze, and serve.
Makes about 2 to 2-1/2 quarts.
